headline: MACC Seizes Record RM2.1 Billion in Money Laundering
context: MACC anti-money laundering division seized RM2.1 billion across 18 cross-border investigations in 2025 largest annual haul.

cards.big: MACC seized RM2.1 billion in record money laundering busts in 2025
cards.sub: 18 investigations uncovered networks spanning Malaysia Singapore HK and Dubai

cards.big: Largest case involved RM680 million through 45 shell companies
cards.sub: Funds from illegal gambling moved through cryptocurrency exchanges

cards.big: Real estate accounted for 52% of laundered assets seized by value
cards.sub: 180 properties in KL Penang and Johor used as laundering vehicles

cards.big: Mutual legal assistance requests to other jurisdictions rose 45%
cards.sub: Faster cooperation with Singapore and HK reduced case resolution by 6 months

cards.big: Money laundering seizures test whether cross-border cooperation can match criminal sophistication
MACC seizes RM2.1 billion in money laundering. Recovery without systemic reform leaves the pipeline intact.
